node.text:
Behind the fan experience is a data platform that connects people around the globe with the Olympic Movement. 

As the Worldwide Digital Transformation Partner, Deloitte is helping bring fan favorite moments to a digital global audience. Their favorite athletes, sports, teams – so that each event, each win and each ‘first’ feels personal. 

#TheFirstEffect

node.text:
Experience the true spirit of the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games through the eyes of our dedicated volunteers! ✨

Join us for a ‘day in the life’ at Milano Cortina 2026, where passion meets purpose in the heart of Milan. From welcoming guests to orchestrating events, every volunteer makes these Olympic and Paralympic Games unforgettable.

As the Technology Integration Partner, we celebrate @Milanocortina2026.

#MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #Paralympics #Milan

Join us in celebrating Jenny Lyons (née Owens), three-time Olympian and Deloitte Australia senior consultant.
 
No dream is too big for Jenny—a mindset that has helped her make an impact in alpine and freestyle skiing as well as in business. 
 
“My experiences have taught me to lead with purpose, adapt quickly, and keep looking for ways to grow — not just in sport, but in business and life. Even when it’s tough.”
 
Learn more about Team Deloitte: https://delo.tt/6177hZvnJ
 
As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, Deloitte celebrates the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 
 
#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

@jennyowens_oly

node.text:
The key to a successful event is ensuring the right people are in the right place, at the right time. During the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games, over 160,000 people must be identified, screened, and accredited to access their destinations. 

For the International Olympic Committee (IOC), the solution to this complex puzzle starts and ends with Deloitte. Through integrated technology solutions, Deloitte supports the IOC to identify, organize and enable accreditation needs, access control, and workforce management. 

That’s why, when the eyes of the world are watching, no one misses a beat of the action; on or off the field of play. 

To learn more about Deloitte’s partnership with the IOC, visit IOC: https://delo.tt/6179hb9Y3

#MilanoCortina2026 #MoreThanSport #TogetherMakesProgress

node.text:
Deloitte is proud to be helping place fans at the heart of the @milanocortina2026 Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games.

#olympics #paralympics #MilanoCortina2026 #TogetherMakesProgress

Joe Ucuzoglu, Deloitte Global CEO, congratulates and thanks the team at the Technology Operations Centre for all they have done to help bring the world’s largest multi-sport event to life.

#Milan #TogetherMakesProgress #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026

📸 @gettyimages @grahamdenholm

Meet multi-sport Olympian and Deloitte Ireland people and purpose strategic projects lead, Claire Dunne (née Bergin). 

As someone who thrives around people, it’s no surprise Claire credits part of her success in bobsleigh, athletics, and business to the mentorship and coaching she’s received throughout the years. 

“I recognize the value of learning and developing from those who are different from you and can challenge you.” 
 
Learn more through the link in our bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, Deloitte celebrates the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

node.text:
Nicole Silveira went first to make more firsts possible. She currently mentors the next generation of Brazilian skeleton athletes and could bring home her country’s first Winter Olympic medal at Milano Cortina 2026. #TheFirstEffect 

Link in bio.

node.text:
This year at the Olympic Winter Games, around 18,000 smiling faces and guiding hands will be helping to bring the world’s largest multi-sport event to life, thanks to the Milano Cortina 2026 volunteer portal, powered by Deloitte. 

Integrated with the Milano Cortina 2026 website, this portal processed thousands of completed applications with a single, intuitive interface: effectively cutting months of manual coordination into a streamlined, digital experience. 

While sport may be center stage at the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games, this spectacular event would not be possible without these incredible volunteers. 

Learn more about Deloitte’s partnership with the IOC throught the link in our bio.

#MilanoCortina2026 #MoreThanSport #TogetherMakesProgress

node.text:
The spirit of the Olympics is officially on display, following the Opening Ceremony of the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026! 

As Worldwide Partner for the IOC, Deloitte hopes everyone at Milano Cortina 2026 had a wonderful Opening Ceremony and wishes all competing athletes the best of luck as they step onto the field of play. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #MoreThanSport #TogetherMakesProgress

node.text:
Firsts move the world forward. They unlock human potential and inspire new breakthroughs. 

What firsts will we see at @milanocortina2026? And what will they inspire next? 

#TheFirstEffect 

Link in bio.

As Worldwide Olympic and Paralympic Partner, Deloitte is delighted to announce the Winners and Highly Commended finalists of the IOC Climate Action Awards 2025.

Winners: 
Athletes – Hugo Inglis and Kevin Wekesa 
International Federation (IF) – International Biathlon Union (IBU)
National Olympic Committee (NOC) – Nederlands Olympisch Comité* Nederlandse Sport Federatie 

Highly Commended finalists:
International Federation (IF) – World Sailing 
National Olympic Committee (NOC) – Comité Olímpico Español

Congratulations to all the initiatives awarded! We are excited for their potential to lead to new innovations and opportunities for sports organizations to help drive sustainability in sport and beyond. 

Together, we can help create more resilient Olympic and Paralympic Movements. 

Learn about these impactful initiatives through the link in our bio.

Congratulations! #MoreThanSport #TogetherMakesProgress

@hugo.inglis @yokooh @biathlonworld @worldsailingofficial @coe_es

node.text: Check out top challenges from 2026 M&A Trends respondents. Clearly, agility has never been more important. Read the full report! #DeloitteUS

Sport is about perseverance, resilience, and the courage to move forward. To our Team Deloitte athletes who had hoped to compete at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026: we see you. We celebrate the dedication, discipline, and growth that we've witnessed in your pursuits. Your journeys continue to inspire us and we support you. 

Learn more about Team Deloitte through the link in our bio.
 
As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner to the IOC, Deloitte celebrates the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte
 
#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

node.text: Big air snowboarder Hiroto Ogiwara is pioneering tricks that were once only possible in dreams. Now that it’s reality, what will we reach for next? #TheFirstEffect

What a day! As day four at #WEF26 ends, we are thrilled to share a recap of our week and last set of panels this morning at Deloitte Haus! 

Some notable moments? Our panels! 

From sharing report insights that position organizations for long-term success through sustainability considerations to exploring some of the ways health care systems can leverage AI to reshape access, transform diagnosis, and rethink treatment, you will not want to miss viewing these sessions.

And a special thank you to our #DeloitteAtDavos team on the ground who worked hard to make sure everyone had an outstanding experience while visiting the space.

Watch the full replays and explore the full program through the link in our bio.

Swipe through some inspiring highlights from day three at #WEF26! 

Between Deloitte’s Imagination in Action AI Summit sponsored dialogues at the iconic Dome, our latest “State of AI in the Enterprise report”, accelerating place-based change through innovation with Yes/Cities, and the live recording of the AI Leadership Lab podcast, Deloitte leaders continued to leave a mark across the Promenade. 

“This year the conversation has matured; is more around using Ai for collaboration, driving value…seeing AI as a colleague to a certain extent and of course, the great thing about that is that we no longer speak about the technology, but the impact that it has in the workforce, the impact that it has in society as a whole.” Costi Perricos, Deloitte Global  Gen AI Business leader.

Don’t miss any of the insights, register to join our virtual panel discussions through the link in our bio.

Dive into day two at #WEF26!

We explored some of the ways organizations are positioning themselves to realize meaningful value from #AI, the significance of energy, resources and infrastructure investments to build future economic prosperity, and how businesses are responding to shifts in global trade policy. 

“It is important to recognize we are operating in a different time …we’ve moved into a more dynamic world, given some of that dynamism it calls for new technologies to actually help solve some of the decision-making process…”, said Andrew Swart, Global Energy, Resources & Industrials Industry leader.

Register to attend our virtual programming from Deloitte Haus and explore the whole #DeloitteAtDavos program through the link in our bio.

#DeloitteAtDavos, #TogetherMakesProgress

Here’s your first look at day one of #WEF26! 

From an exciting panel exploring ways leaders are reimagining finance in the age of Agentic #AI to an insightful networking reception fostering connections, the energy at Deloitte Haus was amazing. 

“We are excited to be back at our Deloitte Haus in Davos; we will be hosting conversations from AI to resilient infrastructure, health and well-being and hyper-adaptive business models, to help manage and address, the ever-changing economy” said Asif Dhar, Deloitte WEF Lead Relationship Partner and Global Consulting Services Growth leader.

View our full program and register to attend the virtual panel discussions at https://delo.tt/6178C4cLj or the link in our bio.

#DeloitteAtDavos, #WEF26, #TogetherMakesProgress

To learn more about our presence or to register for upcoming virtual panel discussions, visit the link in our bio!

#DeloitteAtDavos

node.text:
Meet @kennympindou and @lukedputo—two bobsledders aiming to qualify for #MilanoCortina2026 and compete at their first Olympic Winter Games. 

Join us in cheering them on as we support their athletic and professional journeys alongside the people who uplift them each day: their families, friends, colleagues, coaches, mentors, leaders, and those in between. #TogetherMakesProgress 

Dual careers. One #TeamDeloitte. 

Link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte.

node.text:
Harnessing the power of together, Deloitte is thrilled to be back at Davos to join leaders across business, government and civil society convening under the theme, “A Spirit of Dialogue” to help drive progress on the matters we care about. 

Explore our full program and register for events. Link in bio!

#DeloitteAtDavos #Togethermakesprogress #WEF26

Are you ready for #WEF26? Deloitte is excited to share insights, showcase scalable sustainable solutions, and lead discussions that help accelerate the possibilities of tech-driven transformation to unlock resilient futures.

Register to join the virtual panel discussions and explore our full program via the link in our bio!

#DeloitteAtDavos

❄️ Just 30 days to go until the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026! 

The excitement is building as athletes and fans around the world will soon come together to witness an unforgettable celebration of winter sports. Deloitte is proud to be the Worldwide Technology Integration Partner for the International Olympic Committee, helping bring innovation to the Winter Olympics. 

Explore Deloitte's partnership with the International Olympic Committee and how we are working together to drive progress. 

Deloitte.com/olympics

node.text:
To do our part to help build resilient and prosperous futures, Deloitte is leading discussions and showcasing solutions around key topics at #WEF26 like AI, resilient infrastructure, agile supply chains, and more.

Explore our full program and register to join upcoming virtual panel discussions by visiting the link in our bio.
 
#DeloitteAtDavos #AI #supplychain #infrastructure

#WEF26 marks the 56th Annual Meeting of the World Economic Forum in Davos. See how Deloitte is working to help scale sustainable solutions and unlock resilient futures. 

Learn more by visiting the link in our bio.

#DeloitteAtDavos

Deloitte will soon return to Davos for the Annual Meeting of the World Economic Forum! 
To explore some of the ways we’re connecting our unique ecosystem to discussions that help accelerate the possibilities of tech-driven transformation, visit the link in our bio.
.
.
.
#DeloitteAtDavos #WEF26

Meet Luke Puto. 

See how this first-time Olympic Games hopeful and auditor is using his analytical side to drive results on the bobsled track and in business at Deloitte Canada. 

Link in bio. 

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

Three-time Olympian, Jenny Lyons, is the skier and senior consultant coming out of retirement to make a comeback at 47 years old, proving that age is just a number. When she’s not on the slopes, at home with her family, training or using her experience to uplift women’s sport, Jenny’s helping athletes reach new heights in business at Deloitte Australia. 

Learn more about Team Deloitte through the link in our bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026

Meet Kenny M’Pindou. 

See how this first-time Olympic Games hopeful and cyber analyst is making possibilities a reality in sport and business at Deloitte Canada as he aims to qualify for #MilanoCortina2026 in bobsleigh.

Link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #TeamDeloitte #Olympics 

@kenmpindou

node.text:
This International Day of Persons with Disabilities, the insights from Deloitte Global’s Disability Inclusion @ Work report highlight the importance of workplace accessibility—and how someone’s experience at work can be impacted by it. 

#IDPD #IDPwD #DisabilityInclusion #Neurodiversity #Accessibility

Meet Jenny Lyons (née Owens). 

See how the three-time Olympian and senior consultant is using her sporting success to make an impact and drive results at Deloitte Australia. 

Link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the MilanoCortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 
 
#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

When a tragic bus accident left Luke Puto and his community in Humboldt, Canada grieving, Luke found inspiration in the realization that life is precious and decided to try something that had always piqued his interest: bobsleigh. 

With big dreams, a competitive itch and commitment to continual self-improvement, Luke is now one step closer to qualifying for the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. When he’s not driving results on the bobsled track, Luke is helping Deloitte Canada clients stay on track as an auditor. 

Learn more about Team Deloitte through the link in our bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 

@lukedputo

After pivoting dreams from the soccer pitch to the bobsled track in 2021, Kenny M’Pindou is the bobsledder and cyber analyst thinking strategically to stay ahead of the curve—in business at Deloitte Canada and in sport. 

When he’s not digging into the latest tech insights, Kenny is sharing how sport has allowed him to embrace his speech impediment and is working to help raise awareness and create safe spaces for the stutter community with local youth advocacy programs. 

Learn more about Team Deloitte  through the link in our bio.

 As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 

@kenmpindou

node.text:
Firsts seem impossible. Until they’re not. Josh Dueck redefined the limits of sport when he became the first person to land a backflip in a sit-ski, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.
 
In 100 days, Milano Cortina 2026 will bring new firsts to the Paralympic stage. As the Worldwide Technology Integration Partner to the Paralympic Winter Games, Deloitte is helping fans experience firsts in real time. #TheFirstEffect

The last edition of COP and coffee concluded the Deloitte programming at #COP30 🌎 with a conversation on #innovation. Thank you to the speakers who shared their experience, ideas and hope for a more #sustainable and resilient future during these last two weeks.The key takeaways:

• By fostering collaboration among stakeholders including the private sector, academia, and civil society, innovation ecosystems can pool resources, share knowledge, and co-create solutions that help address complex challenges
• Establishing open platforms and incubators enables rapid prototyping and scaling of technologies, helping to ensure that successful pilots are adapted and implemented globally
• Digital public infrastructure can provide standardized tools for impact measurement and reporting, making it easier for stakeholders to demonstrate progress and attract investment 
• Data-sharing platforms can enable stakeholders to access leading practices, track progress, and coordinate efforts, ultimately helping to drive more effective and inclusive action
• Mobilization of dedicated climate finance streams and blended finance mechanisms targeted at local innovators and community-led projects can support greater access to financing and capability-building for developing countries

To explore insights on the topics discussed during the sessions, please visit the link in our Bio!

 #DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability

node.text:
Meet three-time Olympian and Deloitte Australia senior consultant, Jenny Lyons (née Owens). 

With a focus on dreaming big, making an impact, and delivering results, Jenny’s success in alpine and freestyle skiing continues to shape her business mindset. 

“The sense of autonomy is something I really value as an athlete, and I love that I can still have that in my professional life. It allows me to be myself and to keep performing at my best—just in a different arena.” 

Learn more about Team Deloitte and Jenny as she aims to compete at Milano Cortina 2026. Link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 
 
#TogetherMakesProgress #TeamDeloitte #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

Today’s #COP30 sessions—from an insightful discussion on accelerating food system transformation, to a healthy debate on artificial intelligence (AI) as an effective tool for sustainability or an energy-intensive substitute for human-led systemic change—reinforced the importance of #collaboration. Key takeaways:

• Food connects communities and cultures; by uniting stakeholders around sustainable food systems, meaningful progress for people and nature can be made
• Integrating regenerative agriculture practices and agroforestry into mainstream food production can help deliver biodiversity benefits at scale—enhancing soil health, carbon sequestration, and habitat restoration
• Blended finance models and impact investment funds that help de-risk private sector participation and mobilize capital for climate-smart agriculture initiatives can help scale nature-based solutions
• The variety of perspectives on AI for sustainability highlighted the importance of ongoing dialogue and collaboration as the complex intersection is navigated
• AI can help accelerate discovery, optimize resource use, and free up human creativity, but it cannot replace community engagement

Thursday’s “COP and coffee” theme is innovation. Enjoy an espresso and conversation in the Deloitte Green Zone pavilion. 

Click the link in our bio to learn more.

#DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability #foodsystems #ai"

From the importance of nature-based solutions to exploring how suppliers in high-emitting sectors can navigate challenges that impact development and scaling of low-carbon solutions, it was another inspiring day in the Deloitte #COP30 Green Zone pavilion. Some key takeaways:

🌿 Biodiversity underpins ecosystem services that businesses rely on, from clean water to pollination 
🌿 Loss of biodiversity can pose material risks to supply chains, operations, and long-term profitability
🌿 Suppliers can overcome technical barriers by engaging in collaborative research and development initiatives that pool resources and expertise, accelerating the development of scalable low-carbon solutions
🌿 Strategic investments in infrastructure and deployment of new technologies such as clean hydrogen and carbon capture, can help facilitate the transition to low-carbon operations and enhance commercial readiness
🌿 Collaborative forums could focus on developing new funding models that align incentives and share risks among stakeholders, and can facilitate joint research and development initiatives, accelerating the deployment of new technologies across sectors

On Wednesday, 19 November, enjoy a Brazilian cappuccino while listening to a discussion on the future of food during the 10 a.m. BRT “COP and coffee.” Then hear industry leaders debate if the benefits of artificial intelligence for sustainability outweigh the environmental impact.

Learn more about Deloitte's presence here: https://delo.tt/61787gR04

#DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability #biodiversity #nature

Today’s sessions in the #COP30 Deloitte Green Zone started with oceans and the blue economy, and concluded with a technical and strategic overview of leveraging data and reporting to help drive meaningful progress in disclosures. Key takeaways include:
 
🌊 Valuing assets like the Great Barrier Reef can demonstrate the economic and social benefits of conservation, which can help inform investment
🌊 Private sector innovation can support monitoring and reporting, enhancing transparency and accountability in ocean management
🌊 Over the next 3-5 years, anticipate greater integration of artificial intelligence and predictive analytics and enhanced automation for real-time risk detection and reporting to support companies’ sustainability risk management and disclosure 
🌊 Technology and data can enable stronger alignment between sustainability goals and business strategy
 
On Tuesday, join “COP and coffee” conversations about nature-based solutions, followed by a panel discussion on pathways toward sustainability for high-emitting sectors.  conference.

Learn more about Deloitte's presence by clicking the link in our bio.

#DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability

As Sunday is a rest day at #COP30, the Deloitte team on the ground are reflecting on a week of meaningful conversations and engagement in Belem, Brazil. They're recharging and looking forward to week two. 

Here are some photos from week one that capture the energy, collaboration, and spirit of the conference.

Learn more about Deloitte's presence here by clicking the link on our bio!
#DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability

Deloitte is proud to collaborate with @femalequotient for Leaders in Cybersecurity 2025, where bold ideas and inclusive leadership took center stage.

Together, we explored how trust, transparency, and collaboration are shaping the future of cybersecurity.

Thank you to the changemakers driving progress and protecting what matters most.

#DeloitteCyber #LeadersInCyber2025 #TheFemaleQuotient 

------

Deloitte est fier de collaborer avec @femalequotient pour l’événement Leaders en cybersécurité 2025, où les idées audacieuses et le leadership inclusif étaient à l’honneur.
 
Ensemble, nous avons exploré comment la confiance, la transparence et la collaboration façonnent l’avenir de la cybersécurité.
 
Merci aux agents du changement qui font progresser le secteur et protègent ce qui compte le plus.
 
#DeloitteCybersécurité #LeadersEnCybersécurité2025 #TheFemaleQuotient

Today’s #sustainable cities🏙 and #resilientinfrastructure sessions at the #COP30 Deloitte Green Zone pavilion focused on practical actions leaders can take to maintain economic stability and enable thriving, future-ready urban communities. Some key takeaways:

▶️ Deploying artificial intelligence can help leaders anticipate extreme weather risks, optimize resource use, and design adaptive infrastructure
▶️ The combination of AI  and advanced technologies—digital twins, predictive maintenance and real-time monitoring—can help reshape urban resilience by reducing emissions, lowering congestion and disruption, and increasing efficiency and circularity
▶️ By 2050, it’s projected that natural disasters could cause approximately US$460 billion in annual average losses to infrastructure globally, but enhancing infrastructure resilience with AI could help save approximately US$70 billion each year 
▶️ Scalable public–private collaborations, harmonized reporting standards, and targeted finance helps develop on-the-ground resilient solutions

For those in Belém, join Deloitte in the Green Zone on Monday, 17 November for a “COP and coffee” session on oceans and later in the day hear from industry leaders during an engaging discussion on unlocking sustainable value through business disclosures. 

Click the link in our bio to learn more!
#DeloitteAtCOP30 #DeloitteSustainability #AI #Infrastructure

From workforce strategy to mobilizing finance, today was another impactful day of focused conversations on how leaders can make meaningful progress toward their sustainability goals at #COP30 in the Deloitte Green Zone pavilion. Key takeaways include:

⚡️ Leaders can achieve lasting success by designing as well as continually evolving management systems that can help drive both organizational and individual performance
⚡️ Advances in artificial intelligence and digital platforms are helping to reshape the way organizations can track, verify, and deploy financial resources, to build  trust and efficiency across the sector
⚡️ Blended finance and strategic collaborations can help mitigate risk in early-stage projects and unlock new sources of capital, including financing for forests and biodiversity 
⚡️ Digital tools and transparent measurement are helping to build investor confidence for forest and nature finance by improving verification and reporting

For those in Belém, please join industry leaders in the Deloitte Green Zone pavilion tomorrow (Friday, 14 November) for “COP and coffee,” panel discussions on sustainable cities and how deploying advanced technologies can help strengthen infrastructure resilience.

👉 Learn more by clicking the link in our bio!
#DeloitteAtCOP30 #CSuiteReport #DeloitteSustainability

node.text:
Don’t let business complexity mute your growth. The right insights, innovation and infrastructure can combine to turn supply pain into gain. Discover how #TogetherMakesProgress

Learn more in our bio.

From reporting and governance to driving sustainable growth inside the C-suite, today was another energetic day of learning and collaboration at #COP30 in the Deloitte Green Zone pavilion:

💡 Boards will increasingly prioritize integrated thinking, embedding sustainability and financial materiality into core oversight
💡 Leaders are prioritizing sustainability with an eye to how they can generate measurable business value
💡 Technology offers a pathway for C-suite leaders to see that important return on investment 
💡Companies that invest are seeing growth, greater resilience, and improved access to capital 

Learn more about how leaders are recognizing the business case and related benefits of corporate sustainability efforts and identifying the right sustainable solutions in Deloitte Global’s 2025 C-suite Sustainability Report.

Tomorrow: conversations continue on green skills and sustainability leadership with COP and coffee and a panel discussion on mobilizing finance. 

👉 Click the link in our bio to learn more!

#DeloitteAtCOP30 #CSuiteReport #DeloitteSustainability

As Worldwide Olympic and Paralympic Partner and supporting partner of the IOC Climate Action Awards 2025, Deloitte would like to congratulate this year’s finalists:
 
Athlete category:
• Rhydian Cowley, Athletics, Australia, @rhydiancowley, @ausolympicteam 
• Hugo Inglis, Hockey, New Zealand, @hugo.inglis, @thenzteam 
• Oliver Scholfield, Hockey, Canada, 
@oscholfield, @teamcanada 
• Gabrielle Smith, Rowing, Canada, @gabrielle.h.smith, @teamcanada 
• Kevin Wekesa, Rugby Sevens, @_yokooh, @officialteamkenya 
 
National Olympic Committee (NOC) category:
• British Olympic Association @teamgb 
• Comité Olímpico Cabo-Verdiano @comiteolimpicocaboverdiano 
• Comité Olímpico Colombiano @olimpicocol 
• Comité Olímpico Español @coe_es 
• Nederlands Olympisch Comité*Nederlandse Sport Federatie @teamnlinsta 
 
International Federation (IF) category:
• International Biathlon Union @biathlonworld 
• International Ski and Snowboard Federation @fisalpine / @fisparkandpipe
• International Table Tennis Federation @ittfworld
• World Sailing @worldsailingofficial
• World Triathlon @worldtriathlon 
 
 
Congratulations! Winners will be announced at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. Stay tuned! Follow the link in the bio to discover how these athletes are taking innovative steps towards sustainability progress. #MoreThanSport #TogetherMakesProgress

Day 2️⃣ at #COP30 in the Deloitte pavilion started with #technology as an enabler and ended with leadership as an accelerator to help drive system-wide solutions. A special thank you to Paul Polman. Key takeaways:

• Innovations in #AI and data center efficiency should be pivotal in shaping a sustainable energy landscape
• Circularity frameworks can help foster great collaboration within the supply chain to help advance circularity
• Companies that move early are already being rewarded with growth, resilience and access to capital
• Progress comes when leaders embed sustainability into major decisions and collaborate across value chains to help change the system, not just the company

Day three the conversation on leadership continues with “Inside the C-Suite: Driving sustainable growth. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio!
.
.
.
.
#DeloitteAtCOP30 #sustainability #circularity #resilience

#COP30 is here! 🌎

As day one kicks off in Belém, Deloitte is proud to be leading important conversations that help accelerate #sustainability solutions, including “COP and coffee” brief daily updates on COP30 developments and thematic days. 

Enjoy coffee and conversation in the Deloitte Green Zone pavilion while staying informed. Tuesday's topic … #AI and #sustainability. 

Learn more here 👉 link in bio.

#DeloitteAtCOP30

user.full_name: WOMEN’S FORUM FOR THE ECONOMY & SOCIETY

node.text:
Deloitte is proud to be a Strategic Partner of the Women's Forum for the Economy & Society, and to have taken part in #WFGM2025—connecting with business leaders and stakeholders from around the world and learning more about actionable solutions that can help make progress on fairness, inclusion and building a better future. 

Learn more about #WomensForum.

Link in bio.

We’re bringing together multi-party stakeholders—public, private and civil society—to help shape a more sustainable future. 

Join us on the road to #COP30, as we shine a spotlight on driving the energy transition, building resilient #infrastructure, optimizing responsible #supplychains and accelerating sustainable growth through #innovation and technology. 

Visit the link in our bio to find out how you can participate. 
.
.
.
#DeloitteAtCOP30 #COP30Brasil, #Sustainability

Meet first-time Olympic Games hopeful, Luke Puto. 

As an auditor and Team Canada bobsledder, Luke is no stranger to taking on new challenges, shifting processes, and pushing his comfort zone for the sake of progress. 

“In work [at Deloitte Canada] and in sport, it's about purposeful practice and showing up as your best and authentic self.” 

Learn more about Team Deloitte through the link in our bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics 

@lukedputo

node.text:
Deloitte is at Smart City Expo World Congress in Barcelona! 

Michael Flynn highlights our commitment to improving communities worldwide. We're exploring how emerging technologies and data are shaping more #resilientcities, from optimizing traffic to enhancing public safety and citizen engagement. 

Our focus on urban resilience, digital tools, and planning innovation integrates disaster preparedness and smart infrastructure. Discover Deloitte's end-to-end infrastructure capabilities at our booth or through the link in bio for more information.

#UrbanResilience #DeloitteAtSCEWC2 #Infrastructure

node.text:
The overlap between difficult and disruptive is where progress can be driven. Together. Discover how #TogetherMakesProgress 

Learn more in our bio.

We are officially one year out from celebrating the beginning of the Youth Olympic Games Dakar 2026—the first Games edition to be hosted in Africa. 
 
As Worldwide Olympic Partner, #Deloitte is passionate about uniting to drive progress and working to create better futures through sport. Together. 

Link in bio.

#1Y2G #YouthOlympicGames #Dakar2026

@Jojdakar2026

node.text:
Firsts seem impossible. Until they're not. 

We’re 100 days away from the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 where big air snowboarder @hiroto_ogiwara is aiming to land a 2340 for the first time in Olympic competition. 

As the Worldwide Technology Integration Partner of the IOC, Deloitte is helping more fans witness moments that were once only possible in dreams.  #TheFirstEffect

node.text:
Progress has no limits. It happens up there, as well as down here. Discover how #TogetherMakesProgress

Learn more in our bio.

Meet first-time Olympic Games hopeful and cyber analyst, Kenny M’Pindou. 

Harnessing the power of big dreams, the drive to make an impact, and a commitment to delivering results—on the bobsled track and at Deloitte Canada—Kenny’s success in sport and business continues to be shaped by his performance mindset and the support system around him. 
 
“There's a saying that goes, ‘If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.’ As I've gotten older, I've realized how true this is. You can't do everything on your own. If you want to succeed and go far in life, you need a village.” 

Learn more about Team Deloitte: link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals aking possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 

#TogetherMakesProgress #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026

#COP30 is fast approaching, where we’re convening business leaders to create practical pathways for the next phase of sustainable growth. 

Visit the link in our bio to explore Deloitte’s program.
.
.
.
#COP30Brasil, #Sustainability #DeloitteAtCOP30

node.text:
Meet @kennympindou and @lukedputo—two bobsledders aiming to qualify for #MilanoCortina2026 and compete at their first Olympic Winter Games. 

Join us in cheering them on as we support their athletic and professional journeys alongside the people who uplift them each day: their families, friends, colleagues, coaches, mentors, leaders, and those in between. #TogetherMakesProgress 

Dual careers. One #TeamDeloitte. 

Link in bio.

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte.

node.text:
The world might be complex, but the data is clear. If you want to go far, go together. Discover how #TogetherMakesProgress

Learn more in our bio.

Meet the Team Deloitte hopefuls aiming to compete at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. 

Slide 2: Jenny Lyons (née Owens) OLY—Senior consultant and skier 

📍 Australia 
 
Slide 3: Kenny M’Pindou—Cyber analyst and bobsledder 

📍 Canada 

Slide 4: Luke Puto—Auditor and bobsledder 

📍 Canada 

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte.

Link in bio.

#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

node.text:
💡🏑 To address sustainability challenges, you need the right pitch. For the International Hockey Federation (FIH), that meant sharing bold ideas and advancing their thinking on innovations like moving towards non-watered turf and substantially reducing water consumption for the practice of hockey at elite level, or planting trees through their ‘Give back to Forest’ initiative. These efforts resulted in them winning the IOC Climate Action Award 2024, supported by Worldwide Olympic and Paralympic Partner Deloitte, and a custom Deloitte Greenhouse Lab built to help accelerate new breakthroughs.

The FIH and Continental Hockey Federations collaborated with Deloitte and the International Olympic Committee – IOC at the Deloitte Greenhouse in Zurich to help shape the future of sustainable hockey events. 💧

From self-wetting hockey balls to the first carbon-zero turf at the Olympic Games Paris 2024, FIH is proving what’s possible when sustainability meets innovation. Deloitte is proud to support organizations across the Olympic and Paralympic Movements to make progress through passion, performance, and purpose. And this is just the beginning. 🌍

#MoreThanSport #Sustainability #MadeForHockey #TogetherMakesProgress

node.text:
Meet Team Deloitte. 

Jenny Lyons (née Owens) OLY—Senior consultant and skier 

📍 Australia 
 
Kenny M’Pindou—Cyber analyst and bobsledder 

📍 Canada 

 Luke Puto—Auditor and bobsledder 

📍 Canada 

As the Worldwide Management Consulting Partner, we celebrate the @Milanocortina2026 hopefuls who join the dozens of extraordinary Olympians and Paralympians who are also Deloitte professionals making possibilities a reality in sport and business. This is #TeamDeloitte 
 
Link in bio. 

#TogetherMakesProgress #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics

node.text: For #GenZ and #Millennials, workplace satisfaction is grounded in financial security, meaning, and well-being. Organizations that align with these values are better positioned to attract, retain, and engage talent. Download the #GenZMillennialSurvey

node.text: Over half of #GenZ and #Millennials already use #GenAI at work and most expect it to shape their future roles. While mostly optimistic about its potential to improve their work and work/life balance, they also have some concerns #GenZMillennialSurvey

node.text: #GenZ and #Millennials expect their managers to coach, support and inspire rather than focus solely on task oversight. To meet these expectations, organizations should equip leaders to serve as talent developers and culture stewards #GenZMillennialSurvey

node.text: 1 in 3 #GenZ and #Millennials opted not to pursue higher education, with many choosing to pursue trades/vocational paths instead. Learn more about how this may impact organizations’ approach to talent recruitment #GenZMillennialSurvey

node.text:
What comes after sport? 🤔
 
For Beijing 2008 Olympian @beckywing, planning for life beyond gymnastics was always part of her journey. 💪 
 
Now thriving at @deloitte she believes that small steps taken early – like building skills and gaining experience – can make a huge difference later on. 💼✨
 
Whether you know your exact path or not, setting yourself up for success can start today - learn more in our bio. 🙌

#Athlete365 #Learning #Deloitte

node.text: #GenZ and #Millennials want to find meaningful, purpose-driven work. Read the #GenZMillennialSurvey to learn how these generations define purpose.

Happy Olympic Day! Inspired by our own Team Deloitte athletes, Deloitte is joining the International Olympic Committee’s “Let’s Move +1” call to action by encouraging our own people to invite friends, family, or colleagues to join them for some physical activity in celebration of Olympic Day on 🗓️23 June and beyond. 

So, who’s your +1? Be a part of this global movement 🌍….and let’s get moving! 🚶‍♀️🚴‍♂️ 

#OlympicDay #LetsMove

node.text: Purpose is highly subjective. How would you define purpose-driven work? Read more #GenZMillennialSurvey
The #GenZMillennialSurvey found that financial concerns are pushing both generations away from #HigherEducation. Read more #GenZMillennialSurvey

What an incredible Alumni Month it has been! From engaging dinners and insightful seminars to reconnecting with old colleagues, making new connections, celebrating shared journeys, and the strength of community. Thank you to everyone who participated and made this month unforgettable. Let's continue building Deloitte’s ‘Colleagues for life’ network. Stay connected and explore more #DeloitteAlumniMonth #OurJourneyTogether #ColleaguesForLife
What’s the big deal about logical qubits? #TECHTalks breaks it down and shows where #QuantumAlgorithms fit into #FinancialServicesOptimization.
Balancing money, meaning, and well-being sets the foundation for overall happiness among #GenZ and #Millennials. #GenZMillennialSurvey
#GenZ is focused on learning and growth, but many are not interested in reaching the top of the corporate ladder. Learn more #GenZMillennialSurvey
57% of Gen Zs and 56% of millennials are already using #GenAI in their day-to-day work. Read more #GenZMillennialSurvey

node.text:
Deloitte Alumni are an important part of Deloitte's story, continually enriching the journey with their experiences and insights. Over the past few years, there have been countless moments of connection, growth, and celebration between Deloitte's alumni. From insightful sessions to memorable gatherings and dinners, Deloitte's alumni have continued to inspire and uplift each other.

Let's reflect on these cherished memories and the incredible journey embarked on together. For the full video, visit the link in bio.
#DeloitteAlumniMonth #OurJourneyTogether #ColleaguesForLife
#GenZ and #Millennials seek money, meaning, and well-being. For employers, this may hold the key to a happier workforce. Download the #GenZMillennialSurvey.
